fdh

expand on interaction SOTA: add cyclic time features (sin/cos hour/dow, is_night) + amt_above_term_q75 + triple interaction (amt_vs_p90 * above_q75)
Experiments: 20
Kept: 5
Discarded: 14
Best AUPRC (val): 0.2519
Best AUPRC (OOT): 0.2316
Baseline (OOT): 0.1378
Improvement: +68.1%

fraud-sim

feature pruning: drop weak features (card_max_amt, card_std_amt, card_median_amt, card_tx_count, is_round_amt, is_weekend, zscore_x_dist, log_home_merch_dist)
Experiments: 20
Kept: 9
Discarded: 10
Best AUPRC (val): 0.8634
Best AUPRC (OOT): 0.8662
Baseline (OOT): 0.6981
Improvement: +24.1%

ieee-cis

add id_31 (browser info) TE - very strong fraud signal (Firefox=100%, opera=80% fraud)
Experiments: 20
Kept: 7
Discarded: 13
Best AUPRC (val): 0.3839
Best AUPRC (OOT): 0.2551
Baseline (OOT): 0.1728
Improvement: +47.6%
# Status Hypothesis AUPRC
val		 AUPRC
OOT		 AUROC
val		 AUROC
OOT		 Composite
val		 PSI Feats
